Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/mnt/c/Dev/sites-didacticos/assets/data/vlsm-levels.json'\)\); print\('Valid JSON. Keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); [print\(f'  {k}: lanRanges={v[\\"lanRanges\\"]}, wan={v[\\"wan\\"]}'\) for k,v in d.items\(\)]")
Bash(bash -c 'export NVM_DIR=""$HOME/.nvm"" && [ -s ""$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"" ] && . ""$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"" && nvm use 22 && npm run build 2>&1')
